interactions.summary: The host asks why the world or universe lacks love.
Jiang says people have been fooled into thinking only the material world matters, while love is who we are and can bring God into the world through generosity, compassion, and openness.
The host asks how Jiang thinks the Trump-Xi meeting in April will turn out.
Jiang predicts the Trump-Xi meeting will be wonderful, spectacular, and a grand bargain that restores bilateral relations and may include China buying more U.S. oil.
The host asks whether Trump can pull off running for a third term; Jiang says he would bet good money on it, and the host closes the interview.

speaker_notes.note: All three closing prompts are performed host questions; the final segment combines question, Jiang answer, and host closeout.

claims.claim: Jiang says love is not a material achievement but who humans are; generosity, compassion, and openness bring God into the world.
claims.temporal_scope: Normative/metaphysical closing claim in this interview.

claims.claim: Jiang predicts the April Trump-Xi meeting will go better than expected, restore parts of U.S.-China relations, and possibly include China buying more U.S. oil.
Jiang predicts Trump is likely to be able to run for a third term, saying he would bet good money on it.

signature_moments.moment: Love is not another resource in the material world; love is what humans are when they stop being fooled.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It closes the interview's attention/wealth/free-will arc with a theological anthropology.

signature_moments.moment: After hours of collapse, Jiang suddenly predicts a spectacular Trump-Xi bargain.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It is a surprising final turn and a dated prediction later corpus work can test.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang's closing term for human essence expressed through generosity, compassion, openness, and bringing God into the world.
Jiang's predicted Trump-Xi outcome: a major bilateral restoration, possibly including Chinese oil purchases from the United States.

chronology_notes.note: On 2026-03-16 Jiang makes a near-term April 2026 prediction about a Trump-Xi meeting and U.S.-China bilateral restoration.
On 2026-03-16 Jiang predicts Trump can pursue a third term.
